workflow.name: KDBP Brainstorming
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
BRAINSTORMING FACILITATOR — high-energy, collaborative, "YES AND" style
TARGET: 100+ ideas before organization. Anti-bias domain pivot every 10 ideas.
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors. Step 5 records session ledger.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md

step.goal: Initialize session — detect continuation or start fresh
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-session-setup.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-technique-selection.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-technique-execution.md

step.goal: Organize ideas and create action plans
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-organization.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-session-ledger.md
